alt: Mandarinfish showcasing its scaleless, brightly pigmented skin
caption: Mandarinfish are completely scaleless; instead, they protect themselves by secreting a thick, bitter, and highly toxic mucus coating that repels predators.
acquisitionNotes: Curated fun-fact photograph illustrating scaleless toxic mucus skin adaptations. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/11/Pez_mandar%C3%ADn_%28Synchiropus_splendidus%29%2C_Anilao%2C_Filipinas%2C_2023-08-24%2C_DD_238.jpg
